commands.review_summary:
The PR refactors status session summary generation to collect lightweight candidates, hydrate only the ten recent rows, preserve counts, and add regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level path: current main hydrates all stored sessions before slicing to recent rows, matching the linked status-latency report. I did not run a live timing reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus normal maintainer/CI review, not a concrete repair ClawSweeper can safely generate.

target.title: fix(status): limit session summary hydration
target.body:
## Summary
- collect lightweight session candidates first, then hydrate only the recent rows rendered by status summaries
- preserve total and per-agent session counts from the full store
- add regression coverage proving non-recent rows are not model/runtime hydrated

Fixes #84787

## Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/status.summary.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/status.summary.test.ts src/commands/status.scan.fast-json.test.ts src/commands/status.scan.test.ts
- pnpm run check:test-types
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/status.summary.ts src/commands/status.summary.test.ts
- git diff --check
- pnpm run lint:core
target.author: turbotheturtle
